## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo build --locked` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --locked` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] README.md updated if behavior, keys, tabs, or config changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if the change is user-facing
- [ ] Commits are focused and the history is clean
